title: Panel 4: Classical Culture and the Dialogue of Civilizations
description:
Moderator: Dennis Speed, The Schiller Institute 

1) Jacques Cheminade (France); President Solidarité & Progrès: Keynote Address: “A Culture of Curiosity and Perseverance to Explore the Impossible”  23:42

2) Felipe Maruf Quintas (Brazil); Professor of Political Science, Fluminense Federal University, Rio de Janeiro; columnist for “Monitor Mercantil”: “The Role of Brazil in the Dialogue of Civilizations and in the World’s Physical Economy”   41:38

3) Dr. Zaher Wahab (Afghanistan); Dr. Zaher Wahab, Emeritus Professor of Education, Former advisor to Afghan Ministry of Higher Education, Taught at American University of Afghanistan (AUAF), 2013-2020: “Dialogue, Not Clash, of Civilizations”   54:51

4) Dr. George Koo (U.S.); retired business consultant specializing in U.S.-China Trade; Chairman, Burlingame Foundation: “U.S.-China Cultural Relations Are Critical to Prevent War”  1:05:32

5) Mike Robinson (U.K.), Editor, The UK Column: “The Dehumanizing Meta-Sphere”   1:17:51
